title: Salary to Hourly Wage Calculator
subtitle: Convert Annual / Monthly Salary to Hourly Rate
description: Use our free Salary to Hourly Wage Calculator to instantly convert your annual or monthly salary into an hourly rate. Whether you're negotiating a contract, comparing job offers, or planning freelance work, knowing your true hourly wage helps you make informed career decisions. Enter your salary and work hours to see your hourly, daily, weekly, and monthly breakdown.

title: Take-Home Salary Calculator
subtitle: Calculate Your Net Pay After Deductions
description: Our Take-Home Salary Calculator estimates your net pay after common deductions including federal and state taxes, Social Security, Medicare, and retirement contributions. Enter your gross salary and location to see exactly what lands in your bank account each month. Use this to budget accurately and negotiate your next raise or job offer with confidence.

title: Salary After Tax Calculator
subtitle: See Your Income After Federal & State Taxes
description: Our Salary After Tax Calculator shows you exactly how much of your hard-earned income you keep after taxes. Factor in federal income tax brackets, state tax rates, FICA (Social Security & Medicare), and other deductions. Compare post-tax salaries across different states to find the most tax-friendly location for your career.

title: Monthly Salary to Annual Salary Calculator
subtitle: Convert Monthly Pay to Yearly Income
description: Quickly convert your monthly salary to an annual figure using our Monthly to Annual Salary Calculator. Simply enter your monthly gross income and see your projected yearly earnings. Useful for comparing salaried vs hourly positions, understanding your total compensation package, and planning long-term financial goals.

title: Annual Salary to Monthly Salary Calculator
subtitle: Break Down Yearly Pay into Monthly Figures
description: Our Annual Salary to Monthly Salary Calculator breaks down your yearly income into manageable monthly, bi-weekly, and weekly figures. Essential for budgeting, understanding your paycheck structure, and comparing job offers with different payment frequencies. Enter your annual salary and see the breakdown instantly.

title: Salary Increase / Raise Calculator
subtitle: Calculate Your Raise Amount & New Salary
description: Use our Salary Increase Calculator to determine the impact of a raise or promotion. Enter your current salary and either the percentage increase or the dollar amount, and we'll calculate your new salary, the dollar increase, and the percentage change. Plan your financial future and negotiate with confidence.

title: Overtime Pay Calculator
subtitle: Calculate Your Overtime Earnings
description: Our Overtime Pay Calculator helps you estimate your earnings when working beyond standard hours. Enter your regular hourly rate, overtime rate multiplier (typically 1.5x for time-and-a-half), and overtime hours to see your total pay. Perfect for understanding potential earnings from extra shifts or planning your work schedule.

title: Bonus Calculator
subtitle: Estimate Your Bonus Pay After Tax
description: Our Bonus Calculator estimates your take-home bonus after federal and state withholding. Bonuses are typically taxed at a flat supplemental rate (22% federal). Enter your bonus amount, location, and regular salary to see what you'll actually take home. Plan your spending and savings with accurate numbers.

title: Commission Calculator
subtitle: Calculate Your Commission Earnings
description: Our Commission Calculator helps sales professionals and commission-based employees estimate their total earnings. Enter your base salary, commission rate, and sales volume to see your projected total compensation. Tiered commission structures supported. Make informed decisions about your sales career and track your earning potential.

title: How Much Rent Can I Afford Based on Salary?
subtitle: Rent Affordability Calculator by Income
description: Wondering how much rent you can afford? Our Rent Affordability Calculator uses the standard 30% rule — spending no more than 30% of your gross monthly income on housing. Enter your annual salary, monthly debts, and location to find your ideal rent range. Make smarter housing decisions and avoid being house-poor.

title: How Much House Can I Afford Based on Salary?
subtitle: Home Affordability Calculator
description: Our Home Affordability Calculator estimates how much house you can afford based on your income, down payment, and current interest rates. Using the 28/36 rule (front-end and back-end ratios), we calculate your maximum home price, monthly mortgage payment, and required income. Plan your home purchase with confidence.

title: How Much Car Can I Afford Based on Salary?
subtitle: Car Affordability Calculator
description: Our Car Affordability Calculator helps you determine a realistic car budget based on your income and expenses. Financial experts recommend keeping total car costs (payment, insurance, fuel, maintenance) under 10-15% of your monthly take-home pay. Enter your salary and current obligations to find your ideal car price range.

title: Salary vs Cost of Living Calculator
subtitle: Compare Salaries Across Different Cities
description: Our Salary vs Cost of Living Calculator lets you compare how far your salary goes in different cities and countries. Enter your current salary and location, then select a target city to see the equivalent salary needed to maintain the same standard of living. Essential for relocation decisions and remote work planning.
ogTitle: Salary vs Cost of Living Calculator

title: Salary Inflation Calculator
subtitle: Adjust Your Salary for Inflation Over Time
description: Our Salary Inflation Calculator shows how inflation erodes your purchasing power over time. Enter your current salary, the number of years, and the expected inflation rate to see what your salary needs to be to maintain the same standard of living. Essential for understanding whether your raises are keeping up with inflation.

title: Salary Comparison Calculator
subtitle: Compare Two Job Offers Side by Side
description: Our Salary Comparison Calculator helps you compare two job offers or salaries side by side. Factor in base salary, bonus, benefits value, commute costs, and cost of living differences. Get a comprehensive comparison that reveals the true value of each offer. Make informed career decisions with data, not gut feeling.

title: Salary Percentile Calculator
subtitle: See Where Your Salary Ranks Among Peers
description: Our Salary Percentile Calculator shows where your income falls compared to others in your profession and location. Enter your salary, job title, and location to see your percentile ranking (e.g., top 10%, median, bottom 25%). Use this data to negotiate raises, evaluate job offers, and benchmark your career progress.

title: Salary Savings Calculator
subtitle: How Much Can You Save Based on Your Salary?
description: Our Salary Savings Calculator projects how much you can save over time based on your income and savings rate. Enter your annual salary, current savings, monthly expenses, and target savings rate to see your projected savings growth. Visualize your path to financial goals and see the impact of increasing your savings rate.

title: Salary-Based FIRE Calculator
subtitle: Calculate Your Financial Independence & Early Retirement Number
description: Our FIRE (Financial Independence, Retire Early) Calculator estimates how long until you can retire based on your salary, savings rate, and current investments. Using the 4% rule, we calculate your FIRE number and the years to reach it. Enter your income, expenses, and current savings to see your path to financial independence.

title: Job Offer Comparison Calculator
subtitle: Compare Total Compensation Packages
description: Our Job Offer Comparison Calculator helps you evaluate multiple job offers by comparing total compensation. Factor in base salary, bonuses, equity, benefits (healthcare, 401k match, PTO), commute costs, and cost of living. See which offer truly pays more when all factors are considered. Make your next career move with complete confidence.

title: Freelance Hourly Rate Calculator
subtitle: Convert Your Salary to a Freelance Hourly Rate
description: Our Freelance Hourly Rate Calculator helps you determine what hourly rate to charge as a freelancer or contractor based on your desired annual salary. Factor in billable hours, business expenses, taxes, paid time off, and benefits you'd need to cover yourself. Set your freelance rates with confidence and ensure you're not underselling your skills.
